Ultimate 2026 Meta Guide

Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles:
The Ultimate Combat Guide

Unlock your true combat potential by mastering the core Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles. Whether you prefer the relentless combo chains of Boxing, the mid-range counter-attacks of Kendo, or the life-stealing sustain of Vampirism, choosing the right fighting style is the critical difference between dominating the PvP arena and losing your hard-earned streak.

Explore All Styles

Why You Need to Master Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles

In the competitive landscape of this Roblox universe, relying solely on your Stand abilities is a massive beginner's mistake. Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles act as a critical secondary moveset that completely alters your approach to engagement and survival. These specialized combat disciplines grant you brand new active abilities, fundamentally alter your M1 (basic attack) combo strings, and provide entirely new defensive or offensive tactical advantages.

When ranking the very best Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles, top-tier professional players evaluate three primary factors: raw combo extension potential, base damage scaling multipliers, and direct synergy with S-Tier Stands. For example, a burst-heavy Stand like The World requires a specific fighting style that allows for devastating, uninterrupted burst windows during a Time Stop. If you ignore optimizing your fighting style, you are essentially fighting with one arm tied behind your back.

Combo Extensions

Fighting styles break the M1 barrier, allowing infinite loops.

Stat Amplification

Boost your base damage, mobility, and passive health sustain.

Stand Synergy

Cover your Stand's weak points (e.g., adding range to a melee Stand).

Top Ranked Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles List

Below is the complete database of every currently available Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles in the 2026 meta. Review their pros, cons, and best Stand pairings carefully before committing your in-game currency.

Boxing — Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles

Reliable combos, high burst, close-range specialist. Great for extending M1 chains and maximizing damage output in close quarters. The most popular fighting style.

Combo Potential 9/10
Damage Scaling 8/10
Combat Range Close

Unique Ability Moveset

B
Jaw Breaker

A powerful uppercut that launches opponents into the air for follow-up combos.

N
Dash Punch

Lunge forward with a fast punch, closing gaps quickly.

M
Eye Gouge

Temporarily blind the opponent, reducing their accuracy.

How to Obtain

Talk to the Boxing Trainer at Bus Stop 3 (Gym). Costs $5,000.

Pros & Cons Analysis

Advantages (Pros)
  • + Highest combo potential in the game
  • + Great M1 chain extensions
  • + Works with almost every Stand
  • + Easy to learn, hard to master
Vulnerabilities (Cons)
  • - Very short range — requires closing distance
  • - Struggles against kiting and zoning playstyles
  • - No sustain or defensive options

Best Stand Pairings

WhitesnakeThe WorldStar PlatinumCrazy DiamondKing CrimsonPurple Haze

Kendo — Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles

Excellent range and counter-attacks. Synergizes with fast or sword-based Stands. Provides a mid-range option for players who want reach without sacrificing damage.

Combo Potential 6/10
Damage Scaling 7/10
Combat Range Mid

Unique Ability Moveset

B
Quick Draw

A fast unsheathing slash with good range.

N
Counter Slash

Parry an incoming attack and counter with a heavy slash.

M
Multislash

A series of rapid slashes hitting multiple times.

How to Obtain

Talk to the Kendo Master at Bus Stop 7 (Dojo). Costs $7,500.

Pros & Cons Analysis

Advantages (Pros)
  • + Superior range compared to Boxing
  • + Counter Slash punishes aggressive players
  • + Great synergy with blade-based Stands
  • + Solid neutral game in PvP
Vulnerabilities (Cons)
  • - Lower combo potential than Boxing
  • - Counter requires precise timing
  • - Less burst damage in short windows

Best Stand Pairings

AnubisMade in HeavenC-MoonWeather Report

Vampirism — Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles

Provides high sustain and ranged pressure through life steal and blood-based attacks. The best defensive fighting style, but vulnerable to Hamon users.

Combo Potential 7/10
Damage Scaling 6/10
Combat Range Mid

Unique Ability Moveset

B
Blood Drain

Grab an opponent and drain their HP, healing yourself.

N
Space Ripper Stingy Eyes

Fire high-pressure blood beams from your eyes for ranged damage.

M
Freeze Touch

Freeze an opponent on contact, immobilizing them briefly.

How to Obtain

Find the Vampire NPC at night near Bus Stop 9. Costs $10,000 + Stone Mask.

Pros & Cons Analysis

Advantages (Pros)
  • + Life steal provides excellent sustain
  • + Space Ripper gives reliable ranged damage
  • + Freeze Touch creates combo openings
  • + Best style for extended fights and 1vX
Vulnerabilities (Cons)
  • - Takes extra damage from Hamon users (hard counter)
  • - Lower burst than Boxing in short trade windows
  • - Blood Drain requires a grab — punishable if whiffed

Best Stand Pairings

The WorldKiller QueenWhitesnake

Step-by-Step: How to Get Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles

Follow these exact instructions within the game map to secure your combat discipline without wasting time running around randomly.

1
Gather In-Game Currency

All Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles cost between $5,000 to $10,000. Defeat thugs or complete storyline quests to farm this cash quickly.

2
Locate the Specific Trainer NPC

Reference the exact bus stop locations mentioned in the cards above. The Boxing trainer is at the Gym, Kendo at the Dojo.

3
Equip and Train

Once purchased, the new style is immediately bound to your character. Press your designated ability keys to unleash your new moves in the wild.

Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles FAQ

What are the best Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles for PvP?

The best Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles depend heavily on your active Stand. Generally, Boxing is considered the top tier for close-range combat and endless combo extensions, while Vampirism is heavily favored by defensive players looking for ultimate sustain in drawn-out PvP encounters.

Can I have multiple Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles at once?

No, players can only equip one of the Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles at a time. If you wish to learn a new discipline like Kendo or Vampirism, you must speak to the respective trainer and pay the required currency, which will overwrite your current style.

Do Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles increase raw damage?

Absolutely. Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles provide passive damage scaling and active abilities that deal significant burst damage. Styles like Boxing have a very high damage scaling stat (8/10), meaning your basic M1 attacks will slice through enemy health much faster compared to having no style equipped.

Ready to Dominate with Top Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles?

Now that you understand the intricacies of every combat discipline, it's time to pair them with the ultimate Stand. Check out our comprehensive tier list to find the perfect synergistic match for your newly acquired skills.
